zh.lifeSummary: 當Aremburge de Vergy於大約0999年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達時，她的父親Henr Ier le Grand de Bourgogne52歲，母親Mahaut de Chalon32歲。她於大約1015年與Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1060年在法國布格o-達謝姆--奧可斯享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aremburge de Vergy于大约0999年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達时，她的父亲Henr Ier le Grand de Bourgogne52岁，母亲Mahaut de Chalon32岁。她于大约1015年与Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1060年在法国布格o-達謝姆--奧可斯享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vergy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English verge ‘rod, pole, or perch (unit of length or area); half-acre’ (Old French verge), perhaps denoting the owner of that amount of land.
English: variant of Ferridge, a habitational name from Verridge Wood in Frant (Sussex). The placename probably derives from Old English fearn ‘fern, bracken’ + hrycg ‘ridge’.
Catalan (Vergé): variant of Verger, a topographic name from Catalan verger ‘orchard’ (from Latin viridiarium).

variants.name: Thivierge
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Henri, Hermel, Lucien, Herve, Renald, Rosaire.
French: variant of Thibierge (and, in North America, an altered form of this), which is of the same origin as Théberge (see Theberge ). The surname Thivierge is very rare in France. Compare Verge .

History: Hippolyte Thibierge from Blois in Loir-et-Cher, France, married Renée Hervet in Blois in 1653, died in Sainte-Famille, Île d'Orléans, QC, in 1700. His descendants also bear another altered form of the surname, Verge.

variants.name: Verges
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Raul, Carmelita, Gilberto, Jorge, Jose, Juanita, Lourdes, Nieves, Rafael, Ricardo, Vidal.  French Emile.

French (Occitan; Vergès) and Catalan (Vergés): from the plural of Occitan verg(i)èr and Catalan verger ‘orchard’, a topographic name for someone who lived near an orchard or garden, or an occupational name for someone who was employed in one (see Verge 3 and Verdier 2).

en.lifeSummary: When Aremburge de Vergy was born about 0999, in Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, her father, Henr Ier le Grand de Bourgogne, was 52 and her mother, Mahaut de Chalon, was 32. She married Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais about 1015. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died about 1060, in Semur-en-Auxios, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aremburge de Vergy est née environ 0999, à Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Henr Ier le Grand de Bourgogne, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Mahaut de Chalon, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais environ 1015. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1060, à Semur-en-Auxios, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aremburge de Vergy um 0999 in Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henr Ier le Grand de Bourgogne 52 und ihre Mutter Mahaut de Chalon 32. Sie hat um 1015 Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1060 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Semur-en-Auxios, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aremburge de Vergy è nata il circa 0999 nel Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Henr Ier le Grand de Bourgogne, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Mahaut de Chalon, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais circa 1015. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1060, nel Semur-en-Auxios, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aremburge de Vergyが約0999年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルで生まれた時，父Henr Ier le Grand de Bourgogneは52歳，母Mahaut de Chalonは32歳であった。約1015年にDalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnaisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1060年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルセムル-エン-アウクシオスで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aremburge de Vergy(이)가 대략 0999년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henr Ier le Grand de Bourgogne(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mahaut de Chalon(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1015년 Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1060년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 젬--오스이오스에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.um 0999–um 1060: tany ho any amin'ny 0999–tany ho any amin'ny 1060

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aremburge de Vergy nasceu aproximadamente 0999, em Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Henr Ier le Grand de Bourgogne, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Mahaut de Chalon, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais aproximadamente 1015. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1060, em Semur-en-Auxios, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aremburge de Vergy родилась около 0999 г. в местности кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Henr Ier le Grand de Bourgogne было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Mahaut de Chalon, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais около 1015 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла около 1060 г. в местности семур-ен-ауксиос, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 63 лет.

sm.um 0999–um 1060: e tusa o le 0999–e tusa o le 1060

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aremburge de Vergy nació aproximadamente 0999, en Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Henr Ier le Grand de Bourgogne, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Mahaut de Chalon, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Dalmace Ier de Semur-en-Brionnais aproximadamente 1015. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1060, en Semur-en-Auxios, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 63 años.
